cues.text:
Find a comfortable seat.
Close your eyes.
Let your hands rest gently in your lap.

Take a few easy breaths.
No force, just soft, natural breathing.

Bring your awareness to the center of your chest, your heart space.
Just notice that area.
Breathe into it... gently.

Now bring to mind an image of yourself, as you are right now.
Not the polished version.
Just you... as you actually are today.
And with warmth, offer yourself these words:

May I be well.
May I be at ease.
May I be kind to myself today.
Say them again, slowly, meaning each one.

May I be well.
May I be at ease.
May I be kind to myself today.

If that feels difficult, that's okay.
Just notice the resistance... and breathe through it.
You're allowed to offer this to yourself.

Now bring to mind someone you love easily.
A friend. A child. A pet.
Hold them gently in your awareness.

May you be well.
May you be at ease.
May you be happy.

Let that warmth expand —
to people in your life...
people you barely know...
people who are struggling today...
even people who've hurt you.
Not because they deserve it —
but because this warmth... is yours to give.

May all beings be well.
May all beings be at ease.

Come back to yourself.
Breathe. Notice if anything has shifted.

You carry this with you.
It's always available.
Open your eyes, when you're ready.
